name: Johann Sebastian Bach
abstract: Johann Sebastian Bach (31 March [O.S. 21 March] 1685 – 28 July 1750) was a German composer and musician of the late Baroque period.

about_quotes.speaker: Benny Golson
about_quotes.evidence: I was doing something by Johann Sebastian Bach, transposed some things and bring them together with jazz... I had to eviscerate his music to understand what he was doing
about_quotes.doc_title: Benny Golson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Doug Carn
about_quotes.evidence: No different from Johann Sebastian Bach. I keep trying to tell these idiots you’ve got to build on cumulative knowledge
about_quotes.doc_title: Doug Carn interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 24, 2023
